Function: Relational database storing PII and financial transactions.
The frontend application used by clients to interface with their accounts.
The bridge processes HTTPS requests between the mobile app and the backend database.
Internal switch utilizing ACLs to restrict lateral movement between the DMZ and the Database VLAN.
The ML-driven network sensor monitoring traffic flow for behavioral deviations.
Laptops used by IT staff to manage the database and network configurations.
Routes traffic and enforces default-deny Access Control Lists (ACLs) between the DMZ and internal VLANS.
Hardened intermediary server that IT staff must authenticate through to access the Database VLAN.
Client-side storage caching sales and expense records on the user's Android device before syncing.
